company_type: Oil and Gas Exploration and Production

dependencies: Reliance on third-party midstream service companies and pipeline carriers for gathering, processing and transportation of natural gas
Dependence on drilling rigs, pressure pumping equipment and other oilfield services
Water supply requirements for hydraulic fracturing operations
risks: Pipeline and gathering system capacity constraints
Supply chain disruptions from regional epidemics or pandemics
Shortages of drilling rigs and oilfield equipment during periods of rising commodity prices
Competition for qualified personnel and supplies
Inflationary pressure including rising fuel costs, tightening steel market and labor shortages

regulatory_risks: EPA regulations on methane and greenhouse gas emissions including new Subpart OOOOb and OOOOc standards
Inflation Reduction Act Methane Emissions Reduction Program imposing waste emissions charge
BLM regulations to reduce waste of natural gas from operations on federal and tribal land
PHMSA pipeline safety regulations and leak detection requirements
State and local hydraulic fracturing regulations and potential bans
Climate change legislation and carbon pricing initiatives
Federal and state data privacy laws including CCPA and CPRA
Restrictions on federal oil and gas leasing and permitting
State seismicity response programs affecting disposal well operations
Water use restrictions and disposal regulations
DOE pause on LNG export approvals to non-free trade agreement countries
European Union methane emissions tracking and reduction regulation for energy imports
Cyber Incident Reporting for Critical Infrastructure Act (CIRCIA) requirements
Section 382 limitations on tax attribute utilization following ownership changes
15% corporate alternative minimum tax on book income under Inflation Reduction Act

sanction_risks: Armed conflict and instability in Europe and the Middle East affecting commodity prices and global growth
Russian invasion of Ukraine causing volatility in natural gas and oil prices
Armed conflict between Israel and Hamas potentially spilling over into broader region
